headline: Coca-Cola Leadership Shift Puts Focus On Dividend Strength And Cash Flows
summary: Henrique Braun has been selected to become the next CEO of Coca-Cola, with current CEO James Quincey set to move into the role of Executive Chairman. The Board has approved Coca-Cola's 64th consecutive annual dividend increase, extending a multi decade record of shareholder payouts. These decisions highlight a major leadership transition at NYSE:KO, alongside a continued focus on returning cash to investors. Coca-Cola, trading at around $77.04, is entering this leadership change after...

headline: The Coca-Cola Company (KO) Raises Annual Dividend for 64th Consecutive Year and Appoints New VP
summary: The Coca-Cola Company (NYSE:KO) is one of the 10 best stocks to invest in during a recession. headline: Warren Buffett's Final Top 10 Stock Holdings: Which Ones Will Greg Abel Likely Sell?
summary: Berkshire Hathaway Inc has a new CEO, and Wall Street is watching his every move. Here’s what Greg Abel‘s early commentary suggests about the fate of Warren Buffett‘s top 10 holdings. Berkshire Hathaway's Top 10 Stock Holdings In the fourth quarter, Berkshire under then-CEO Buffett took a new position in the New York Times and adjusted positions in several of the company's top holdings. At the end of 2025, these were the top 10 stock holdings in the conglomerate’s investment portfolio: Apple Inc
